docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY GOMEZ, JORGE ALBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, JORGE ALBERTO
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, JORGE ALBERTO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, JORGE ALBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-03-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KATE GOTRO FILED BY DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON MAR-18-2026 BY ZOOM KATE GOTRO FILED BY DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM KATE GOTRO FILED BY DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON MAR-18-2026 BY ZOOM GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, JORGE ALBERTO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-16-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JORGE ALBERTO GOMEZ IS PRESENT INITALLY ASSISTED BY PERSONAL INTERPRETER CARLOS FLORES. MR. FLORES WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURT. MR. GOMEZ IS ALSO ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONCIS AMERICA, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY KATE GOTRO, LITIGATION PARALEGAL. THE DEFENDANT'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. DEFENDANT WILL PROVIDE MR. GOMEZ AND THE COURT WITH EXHIBITS 5 DAYS PRIOR TO THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE - PLAINTIFF JORGE ALBERT GOMEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAM SUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KATE GOTRO VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER DEFENDANT'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
EXHIBITS RECEIVED BY MAIL FROM DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC.
